bio: Blasting into the charts with the posse cut "Cayó la Noche (Remix)," Spanish vocalist Quevedo immediately attracted attention with his strong delivery and unique, deep-pitched voice. In just a year, he became one of the genre's biggest new stars, topping international charts and breaking records with Bizarrap collaboration Quevedo: Bzrp Music Sessions, Vol.

rows: BICHOTA RECORDS / INTERSCOPE RECORDS / UNIVERSAL MUSIC LATINO
